---
id: check-schema-availability
title: "Check schema availability for a product type and asset class"
description: "Returns all schemas registered under deals/{productType}/{assetClass}."

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Check schema availability for a product type and asset class"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/config/schemas/{productType}/{assetClass}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all schemas registered under deals/\{productType\}/\{assetClass\}.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
